headline: Man's Resume Boasts 'Microsoft Office Expert' But He Doesn't Know What A PDF Is
summary: He has been sending screenshots of Word documents and calling them 'my special format.'
fullBody: Barry Clickwell's resume claims 'advanced proficiency in all Microsoft Office applications.' In reality, he saves everything as .docx and emails them with the subject line 'please open this I don't know what a PDF is.' His new boss discovered this when Barry asked 'how do I make the letters not move' while trying to edit a spreadsheet. Barry has since been assigned to 'special projects' in the broom closet.
